title: Create AI-powered task automation system

requirements.text: Create a task submission interface where users can input instructions for AI to execute human activities

quotes: A app named flower which does all human activities with the help of artificial intelligence as given instructions

acceptanceCriteria: Users can enter natural language instructions for tasks
Interface provides clear feedback on instruction submission
Instructions are validated before submission

requirements.text: Implement backend task processing system that parses and categorizes user instructions into executable task types

quotes: does all human activities with the help of artificial intelligence as given instructions

acceptanceCriteria: System categorizes instructions into task types (e.g., scheduling, data processing, content generation)
Instructions are stored with metadata including timestamp and user identity
Invalid or unclear instructions return appropriate error messages

requirements.text: Create task execution engine that processes categorized tasks and generates results

quotes: does all human activities with the help of artificial intelligence

acceptanceCriteria: Engine executes tasks based on their category and parameters
Results are generated and stored with execution metadata
System tracks task status (pending, in-progress, completed, failed)

requirements.text: Build task dashboard displaying submitted tasks, their status, and execution results in real-time
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows list of all tasks with status indicators
Users can view detailed results for completed tasks
Interface updates automatically when task status changes
Performance metrics display execution speed for each task

requirements.text: Implement performance optimization system that prioritizes and executes tasks efficiently
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks are executed in optimized order based on dependencies and priority
System tracks and displays execution time for each task
Performance benchmarks compare execution speed to typical human completion time

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme with vibrant botanical colors (greens, purples, warm earth tones) and organic flowing layouts that reflect growth and natural intelligence, applying this aesthetic consistently across all UI components
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses botanical-inspired colors throughout the application
Typography and spacing create a modern, organic feel
Layout elements use smooth, natural flowing patterns
Visual style is consistent across all pages and components

constraints: Must use Motoko for backend implementation
Must use React with TypeScript for frontend
All logic must reside in single main actor file
Cannot integrate external AI APIs or LLM services
nonGoals: Integration with external AI services (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

required: Organic flower logo with flowing petals in botanical green and purple gradient (flower-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Abstract background with subtle botanical patterns and soft flowing lines (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
